executives.name: Patrick Gelsinger
executives.background: Patrick P. Gelsinger has been a director and Intel’s CEO since February 2021. He has over 40 years of technology and leadership experience, including 30 years at Intel in various engineering and leadership roles. Prior to returning to Intel, he served as CEO of VMware, Inc. from 2012 to 2021 and as President and COO of EMC Corp.’s Information Infrastructure Products business from 2009 to 2012.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: David Zinsner
executives.background: David A. Zinsner has been Intel’s Executive Vice President and CFO since January 2022. Before joining Intel, he was Executive Vice President and CFO at Micron Technology, Inc. from 2018 to 2022. He also served as President and COO of Affirmed Networks and held CFO roles at Analog Devices and Intersil Corp.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Michelle Johnston Holthaus
executives.background: Michelle Johnston Holthaus is Executive Vice President and General Manager of the Client Computing Group. She has been with Intel since 1996, serving in various leadership roles in sales, marketing, and business management, including as Chief Revenue Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and General Manager, Client Computing Group
Various senior executive roles, including Executive Vice President, Chief Revenue Officer, General Manager of Sales, Marketing & Communications, CEO of Intel Products, and Interim Co-CEO.

executives.name: Christoph Schell
executives.background: Christoph Schell is Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer. He joined Intel in 2022 from HP Inc., where he was Chief Commercial Officer. He has over 25 years of experience in the technology industry, including roles at Philips and Procter & Gamble.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer
Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer

executives.name: Safroadu Yeboah-Kodie
executives.background: Safroadu Yeboah-Kodie is Senior Vice President and Chief Strategy Officer. He joined Intel in 1999 and has held various technical and leadership positions, including Corporate Vice President in the Datacenter Group.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Strategy Officer

executives.name: Abhi Talwalkar
executives.background: Former President and CEO of LSI Corporation. Director since 2017.

executives.name: Abhijit Talwalkar
executives.background: Mr. Talwalkar has been a director since 2011 and Chairman of the Board since 2019. He was President and CEO of LSI Corporation from 2005 to 2014.

tenure_dates.title: Corporate Vice President and General Manager, Digital Enterprise Group

executives.name: Alyssa Henry
executives.background: Alyssa Henry has been a director since 2020. She was previously CEO of Square (now Block, Inc.) and held leadership roles at Amazon Web Services and Microsoft.

executives.name: Aneel Bhusri
executives.background: Co-founder and Executive Chair of Workday, Inc.

executives.name: Aparna Bawa
executives.background: Chief Operating Officer of Zoom Video Communications, Inc. She joined our board in May 2021.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Chief Legal & People Officer

executives.name: Barbara Novick
executives.background: Barbara G. Novick has been a director since 2022. She is a co-founder of BlackRock, Inc. and served as Vice Chairman until 2021.

executives.name: Brice Hill
executives.background: Brice Hill is Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Applied Materials, joining in March 2022. He previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Xilinx, Inc. and spent 25 years at Intel Corporation in various finance and strategy leadership positions.

tenure_dates.title: Various senior finance roles (including capacity strategy, PC desktop and chipsets, and data center)

executives.name: Diane Bryant
executives.background: Ms. Bryant has served as a director since January 2019. She was previously the Chairman and CEO of NovaSignal Corp. and served as COO of Google Cloud. She spent 32 years at Intel Corporation, most recently as Group President of the Data Center Group.

executives.name: Dion Weisler
executives.background: Dion J. Weisler has been a director since 2020. He was President and CEO of HP Inc. from 2015 to 2019.

executives.name: Frank Yeary
executives.background: Frank D. Yeary has been a director since 2009 and Chairman since January 2023. He is Principal of Darwin Capital Advisors, LLC and was previously Executive Vice Chairman of CamberView Partners, LLC and Vice Chancellor of UC Berkeley.

executives.name: Gregory Smith
executives.background: Gregory D. Smith has been a director since 2021. He was previously CFO and Executive Vice President of Enterprise Operations at The Boeing Company.

executives.name: James Goetz
executives.background: James J. Goetz has been a director since 2019. He is a Partner at Sequoia Capital, a venture capital firm, which he joined in 2004. He previously held leadership positions at Entrust and VitalSigns Software.

executives.name: John Thornton
executives.background: Executive Chairman, Barrick Gold Corporation; Former President, Goldman Sachs.

executives.name: Johny Srouji
executives.background: Johny Srouji is Apple’s senior vice president of Hardware Technologies, reporting to CEO Tim Cook. Johny built one of the world’s strongest and most innovative teams of silicon and technology engineers, overseeing breakthrough custom silicon and hardware technologies.

executives.name: Lip-Bu Tan
executives.background: Lip-Bu Tan has been a director since 2022. He is Chairman of Walden International and was formerly CEO and Executive Chairman of Cadence Design Systems, Inc.

executives.name: Omar Ishrak
executives.background: Dr. Omar Ishrak has been a director since 2017 and served as Chairman from 2020 to 2023. He was Chairman and CEO of Medtronic plc from 2011 to 2020.

tenure_dates.title: Member, Board of Directors (Chairman of the Board 2020–2023)

executives.name: Rani Borkar
executives.background: Rani Borkar is Corporate Vice President, Azure Hardware Systems and Infrastructure at Microsoft Corporation. She previously held leadership roles at Intel and IBM.

tenure_dates.title: Corporate Vice President and General Manager, Intel Architecture Development Group

executives.name: Remi El-Ouazzane
executives.background: Remi El-Ouazzane is President, Microcontrollers and Digital ICs Group, a position he has held since 2022. He is a member of ST’s Executive Committee. Prior to joining ST, El-Ouazzane was Chief Operating Officer of Intel’s Artificial Intelligence Products Group. He also served as CEO of Movidius before its acquisition by Intel.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, AI Products Group

executives.name: Renée James
executives.background: Founder, Chairman and CEO of Ampere Computing and former President of Intel Corporation.

executives.name: Risa Lavizzo-Mourey
executives.background: Dr. Risa Lavizzo-Mourey has been a director since 2018. She is President Emerita of the Robert Wood Johnson Foundation and a professor at the University of Pennsylvania.

executives.name: Sandra Rivera
executives.background: Sandra Rivera is the CEO of Altera, an Intel Company. She previously served as Executive Vice President at Intel.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Chief People Officer; EVP & GM Data Center and AI Group

executives.name: Sohail Ahmed
executives.background: Mr. Ahmed has been a director since 2019. He was Senior Vice President and General Manager of the Technology and Manufacturing Group at Intel Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and General Manager, Technology and Manufacturing Group

executives.name: Stacy Smith
executives.background: Stacy J. Smith joined the board in 2023. He previously served as Executive Chairman of Autodesk, Inc. and was the CFO of Intel Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Group President of Manufacturing, Operations and Sales (Past); Director (Current)
